top_signals.title: French Socialists to Oppose Moulin as Bank of France Head
top_signals.summary: Socialist lawmakers will oppose Emmanuel Macron’s nominee for Bank of France Governor, raising the risks of a political blow for the French president and uncertainty over the composition of the European Central Bank’s Governing Council.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Plans to Tighten State Control Over Commodity Exports
top_signals.summary: Indonesia plans to tighten control over commodity exports including coal and palm oil, according to people familiar with the matter, as the government seeks to clamp down on tax evasion and bolster a plunging rupiah.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Target’s Stock Rally Raises Earnings Bar as Comeback Gains Steam
top_signals.summary: Target Corp. has quietly emerged as one of this year’s hottest retail stocks, outperforming many staples and big-box peers. The rally has also raised the bar heading into quarterly results.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Cash Equivalent Transfer Values guidance
top_signals.summary: Technical note on the discount rates to be used by the scheme managers of public service pension schemes in calculating transfers payable from the schemes.
